title: ritchiea littoralis
intro: Ritchiea littoralis, also known as the coastal shrub or coastal ritchiea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. The medicinal properties of Ritchiea littoralis include its potential to exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities, which can be used to treat various infections. The health benefits associated with this plant are attributed to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. In traditional medicine, Ritchiea littoralis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can be used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems.
